name: manasiness
description: Business management app for small stores with React, Node.js, Express and PostgreSQL.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run build:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose --env-file .env.docker down -v && docker compose --env-file .env.docker up --build -d
